product_area: Cybersecurity monitoring platform for tokenized real-world assets (RWAs), with primary focus on U.S. Treasury bills, tokenized Treasuries, and debt-market settlement infrastructure on distributed ledger networks.
protected_infrastructure: Tokenized U.S. Treasury bills and tokenized Treasuries
Oracle price feeds for tokenized asset pools
Sovereign compliance and geopatriation control layers
Workspace-scoped monitoring targets and telemetry pipelines

cet_alignment.primary_category: Data Privacy, Data Security, and Cybersecurity Technologies

distributed_ledger_technologies.description: Monitoring architecture targets EVM-compatible chains; oracle worker polls on-chain state; event-watcher ingests on-chain settlement events.

digital_assets.description: Primary protected asset class is tokenized U.S. Treasury bills and tokenized debt instruments; asset registry models tokenized asset metadata and custody chain.

digital_payment_technologies.description: Settlement reconciliation service monitors cross-chain payment finality and flags reconciliation failures in debt-instrument transfer rails.

communications_and_network_security.description: API gateway enforces workspace-scoped access control; JWT session security with role validation; no cross-tenant data leakage by architecture rule; secret scanning on all proof artifacts.

privacy_enhancing_technologies.description: Workspace isolation enforced at data layer; secrets never returned in API responses (boolean presence flags only); audit log provides traceable evidence without exposing raw credentials.

current_claims_allowed: Controlled pilot readiness when make validate-readiness-proof passes with no fail-closed violations
Live evidence architecture that distinguishes live provider evidence from simulator evidence
Fail-closed monitoring runtime derived from canonical backend facts (heartbeat, poll, telemetry)
Full SaaS workflow implemented and tested end-to-end
Workspace-scoped tenant isolation enforced at data layer
Exportable evidence chains for regulatory response and audit
prohibited_claims: Broad paid SaaS ready — billing, email, staging runtime, staging database, staging worker not yet proven in production mode
Production deployment confirmed — no staging or production deployment with live credentials has completed to make safe_to_sell_broadly_today=true
SOC 2, FedRAMP, ISO 27001, or equivalent formal compliance certification
Regulatory approval from FinCEN, SEC, CFTC, or OCC
Live monitoring healthy when reporting systems are zero
Telemetry current when telemetry is missing or stale
Simulator data presented as live customer evidence
financial_stability_relevance: Addresses financial stability monitoring gaps in tokenized Treasury infrastructure identified by FSOC 2023 Annual Report; provides real-time telemetry, fail-closed detection, and evidence chains for on-chain U.S. debt-market settlement systems.
national_importance_basis: Tokenized U.S. Treasury bills represent a growing segment of federal debt-market infrastructure; successful exploits could trigger repricing across institutional portfolios, money market funds, and repo markets; nation-state adversaries have demonstrated intent to target blockchain-based financial infrastructure.
